ownership.acquisition_history: Partners Group acquired KinderCare in 2015. KinderCare IPO'd on NYSE under ticker KLC on 2024-10-09; Partners Group remains the controlling shareholder.

sources.verbatim_quote: Partners Group, our principal stockholder, owns approximately X% of our outstanding common stock.
Partners Group portfolio company KinderCare prices IPO and lists on New York Stock Exchange.
